events.task: Audit Late Night campaign 96-click leak before budget move
events.summary: Read-only deep audit of Late Night campaign 23854158442 before any budget mutation. Live all-period stats: 1,678 impressions, 96 clicks, ₹3,168.82 spend, avg CPC ₹33.01, 0 Google conversions. Click concentration: Open Now Near Me ad group took 81/96 clicks and ₹2,764.50 spend; Biryani/Kabab took 10 clicks/₹292.26; Late Night Bangalore took 4 clicks/₹87.53; Non Veg Halal took 1 click/₹24.54. Top keyword was exact 'restaurants near me open now' with 35 clicks/₹1,178.96 and Quality Score 1/below-average landing + predicted CTR. Top reported search term was 'restaurants nearby' with 21 clicks/₹694.71; reported search terms explain only 39/96 clicks, so Google withholds many query details. Landing proof: /go/google-night is a 200 HTML landing page with buttons, not a direct Maps redirect. /api/google-ads-landing-event shows 66 pageviews, 15 maps clicks, 3 calls, 1 WhatsApp, 1 menu over 30d; therefore only about 15.6% of Google clicks became Maps taps and only 1% became WhatsApp. Root issue: broad generic near-me restaurant demand + non-direct landing funnel, not enough high-intent Maps/dish conversion.
events.next_action: Do not move all budget blindly. Recommended correction before/with budget move: tighten Late Night toward dish/open-now intent, reduce generic near-me spend or force direct directions landing, and add measurement for gclid/source on directions; then reallocate Dinner/Brand budget only after rollback-safe budget readback.
